{{Infobox character
| name = Overlord of Cana
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] would not have targeted the [[Overlord of Cana]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ragnarus Incarnation]] might have the [[Overlord of Cana]] under his control.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Overlord of Cana]] was once a father figure to [[Leah]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Overlord of Cana]] was unable to attend due to being sealed in his own [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
